name: Biblioboard: Open the audiobook at the last open chapter and check time code
fullName: Audiobook in Lyrasis: Biblioboard: Open the audiobook at the last open chapter and check time code

steps.name: Given  I add "LYRASIS Reads" account from welcomeScreen
Then  Account 'LYRASIS Reads' is present on Accounts screen
When  I enter credentials for 'LYRASIS Reads' account
Then  Login is performed successfully
When  I open Catalog
When  I switch to 'Audiobooks' catalog tab
And  I open 'New BiblioBoard Test' category
And  Change books visibility to show AVAILABLE_NOW
And  Click GET action button on random book from the catalog book screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Save book name of the book 'bookInfo' as 'bookNameInfo' on catalog book screen
Then  I check that book 'bookNameInfo' contains LISTEN action button on catalog book screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Button LISTEN is not displayed
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookContainBtn(CatalogBooksSteps.java:61)
	at ✽.I check that book 'bookNameInfo' contains LISTEN action button on catalog book screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/AudiobookLyrasis.feature:65)

steps.name: When  Open book with LISTEN action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
When  Open toc audiobook screen
Then  The first chapter is loaded
When  Open random chapter on toc audiobook screen and save chapter name as 'chapterNameKey'
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Chapter name on audio player screen is equal to 'chapterNameKey' saved chapter name
And  Pause button is present on audio player screen
When  Select 2X playback speed on playback speed audiobook screen
And  Wait for 3 seconds
And  Tap pause button on audio player screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen
When  Save book play time as 'timeAhead' on audio player screen
And  Return to previous screen from audio player screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Chapter name on audio player screen is equal to 'chapterNameKey' saved chapter name
And  Play time is the same with 'timeAhead' play time before restart on books detail screen
When  Open toc audiobook screen
Then  The first chapter is loaded
When  Open the 4 chapter on toc audiobook screen and save the chapter name as 'chapterNameKey2'
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
When  Wait for 3 seconds
And  Tap pause button on audio player screen
Then  Play button is present on audio player screen
When  Save book play time as 'timeAhead' on audio player screen
And  I restart app
And  I open Books
And  Open AUDIOBOOK book with LISTEN action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo on books screen
And  Click LISTEN action button on book details screen
Then  Audio player screen of book 'bookInfo' is opened
And  Chapter name on audio player screen is equal to 'chapterNameKey2' saved chapter name
And  Play time is the same with 'timeAhead' play time before restart on books detail screen
